events.text: Goal!  Croatia 0, England 1. Kieran Trippier (England) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Mario Mandzukic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card.
Kyle Walker (England) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Croatia 1, England 1. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Sime Vrsaljko with a cross.
Ante Rebic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Croatia 2, England 1. Mario Mandzukic (Croatia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ivan Perisic with a headed pass.
